title: Telipogon barbozae
taxonomy: Telipogon barbozae is a species of orchid. This species is classified within the genus Telipogon, which belongs to the subtribe Telipogoninae. The subtribe Telipogoninae is a part of the tribe Drigalinae, which is in the subfamily Drigaleinae. The subfamily Drigaleinae is a part of the family Orchidaceae. This classification makes Telipogon barbozae a member of the orchid family.
properties: Telipogon barbozae is a species of orchid, but specific information about its therapeutic properties is limited in available data. The plant is known to be native to Central and South America, but its medicinal uses are not well-documented. However, some orchids in the Telipogon genus have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. More research is needed to determine the full range of Telipogon barbozae's therapeutic properties. The potential therapeutic uses of this plant are still largely unexplored.
